source_note: JP→zh/en 機械翻訳 (Claude opus, D-136)。figure 問は図を参照し OCR 混入を除去した stem_jp_clean を併記。出典は IPA 過去問 (改変=OCR修復+翻訳)。

stem.zh:
特定电子邮件是指以广告、宣传等营利为目的而发送的电子邮件。下列哪一项仅列出了特定电子邮件发送者负有的义务事项（且全部列出）？

a　明示用于联系拒收电子邮件的目标邮箱地址等。
b　保存收件人同意接收电子邮件（选择加入）的记录。
c　不将电子邮件的发送外包，而由自己亲自进行。
stem.en:
A specified electronic mail is an electronic mail sent for commercial purposes such as advertising or promotion. Which option lists only and all of the obligations imposed on a sender of specified electronic mail?

a  Clearly indicate the email address to which a request to stop sending email should be sent.
b  Retain records of the recipient's consent (opt-in) to receive the email.
c  Send the email by oneself without outsourcing the sending.

ア.zh: a，b
ア.en: a, b

イ.zh: a，b，c
イ.en: a, b, c

ウ.zh: a，c
ウ.en: a, c

エ.zh: b，c
エ.en: b, c

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是对 ROE (Return on Equity) 的说明？
stem.en: Which of the following describes ROE (Return on Equity)?

ア.zh: 表示库存相对于销售额周转了多少次的指标
ア.en: An indicator showing how many times inventory turned over relative to sales

イ.zh: 表示企业财务活动安全性的指标
イ.en: An indicator representing the safety of a company's financial activities

ウ.zh: 表示相对于净资产（自有资本）的盈利性的指标
ウ.en: An indicator representing profitability relative to shareholders' equity (own capital)

エ.zh: 表示从本期净利润中向股东分配的股息金额比率的指标
エ.en: An indicator representing the rate of the amount paid out as dividends to shareholders from the current net profit

イ.zh: 系统集成

2013h25h-q005.stem_jp_clean: X 社のシステム部門に所属している A 氏は, 自社の会計システムの再構築プロジェクトの責任者を任された。システムの再構築を, 企画プロセス, 要件定義プロセス, 開発プロセスの順で進めるとき, 企画プロセスにおけるシステム化計画の立案作業で A 氏が実施する作業として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在 X 公司系统部门工作的 A 先生被任命为本公司会计系统重构项目的负责人。在按照规划流程、需求定义流程、开发流程的顺序推进系统重构时，A 先生在规划流程中的系统化计划立案工作中所执行的工作，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Mr. A, who belongs to the systems department of Company X, was put in charge of the project to rebuild his company's accounting system. When the system rebuild proceeds in the order of the planning process, requirements definition process, and development process, which of the following is an appropriate task for Mr. A to carry out in the work of drawing up the system implementation plan during the planning process?

ア.zh: 确定画面、报表等用户界面需求。
ア.en: Finalize the user interface requirements such as screens and report forms.

イ.zh: 就系统的约束条件和业务需求，取得相关人员的一致同意。
イ.en: Obtain the agreement of the stakeholders regarding the constraints and business requirements for the system.

ウ.zh: 编制提案邀请书（RFP），要求供应商企业提交提案书。
ウ.en: Create a request for proposal (RFP) and ask vendor companies to submit proposals.

エ.zh: 设定质量、成本、交期的目标值及优先级。
エ.en: Set the target values and priorities for quality, cost, and delivery time.

stem.zh: 作为并购（M&A）手段之一的 MBO，符合其定义的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following corresponds to MBO, one of the means of M&A?

ア.zh: 母公司对子公司的收购
ア.en: Acquisition of a subsidiary by its parent company

イ.zh: 竞争对手公司发起的收购
イ.en: Acquisition by a competitor company

ウ.zh: 经营管理层对本公司的收购
ウ.en: Acquisition of a company by its own management team

エ.zh: 子公司对母公司的收购
エ.en: Acquisition of a parent company by its subsidiary

stem.zh:
某零件的生产线由 A、B 两道工序按顺序构成，各工序的机器台数、生产 1 个零件所需的作业时间、不良率如表所示。设 1 天的运行时间为 18 小时，则该生产线 1 天的生产能力（生产出的良品数量）为多少个？此处，假定工序 A 产生的不良品不会送往工序 B。另外，不考虑机器的故障时间、准备调整时间以及工序间的在制品库存，且正在加工中的零件即使到了结束时间也会加工到最后完成。

| 工序 | 机器台数 | 作业时间／个 | 不良率 |
|------|------|------|------|
| A | 1 台 | 3 分钟 | 5％ |
| B | 1 台 | 2 分钟 | 10％ |
stem.en:
A production line for a certain part consists of two processes, A and B, in that order. The number of machines, the work time required to produce one part, and the defect rate for each process are shown in the table. Assuming the daily operating time is 18 hours, how many units is the daily production capacity of this line (the number of non-defective units produced)? Here, defective products from process A are not sent to process B. Also, do not consider machine downtime, setup time, or work-in-process inventory between processes, and any part currently being worked on is finished to completion even if the end time has passed.

| Process | Number of machines | Work time per unit | Defect rate |
|------|------|------|------|
| A | 1 machine | 3 min | 5% |
| B | 1 machine | 2 min | 10% |

stem.zh: 供应链管理（SCM）的目的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the purpose of supply chain management (SCM)?

ア.zh: 通过削减生产、销售、物流等各个流程中不必要的库存以及缩短交付周期（lead time），实现整个流程的最优化。
ア.en: By reducing unnecessary inventory and shortening lead times in individual processes such as production, sales, and logistics, optimize the entire process as a whole.

イ.zh: 为改善生产、销售、物流等整个业务的效率和生产率，从根本上重新审视业务内容和流程并进行重构。
イ.en: To improve the efficiency and productivity of overall operations such as production, sales, and logistics, fundamentally review and redesign the business content and procedures.

ウ.zh: 通过将生产、销售、物流等整个业务外包，实现效率改善和成本降低。
ウ.en: By outsourcing entire operations such as production, sales, and logistics, achieve efficiency improvement and cost reduction.

エ.zh: 在生产、销售、物流等各个流程的基础上，还包含财务、会计等，对经营资源进行一元化（统一）管理。
エ.en: In addition to individual processes such as production, sales, and logistics, manage management resources in a unified manner, including finance and accounting.

stem.zh: 生产和销售产品 A 所需的固定成本为每年 3,990 万日元。当产品 A 的单价为 2 万日元、生产和销售每件产品的变动成本为 5,999 日元时，产品 A 在盈亏平衡点处的销售件数为多少件？
stem.en: The fixed cost required to produce and sell product A is 39.9 million yen per year. When the unit price of product A is 20,000 yen and the variable cost per unit for production and sales is 5,999 yen, how many units must be sold to reach the break-even point for product A?

2013h25h-q010.stem_jp_clean: 企業は，売上高の拡大や市場占有率の拡大などのマーケティング目標を達成するために，4Pと呼ばれる四つの要素を組み合わせて最適化を図る。四つの要素の組合せとして適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 企业为达成提升销售额、扩大市场占有率等营销目标，会组合被称为 4P 的四个要素来进行优化。作为这四个要素的组合，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: To achieve marketing goals such as increasing sales and expanding market share, a company optimizes its strategy by combining the four elements known as the 4P. Which is the appropriate combination of the four elements?

ア.zh: 价格 (price)、产品 (product)、销售促进 (promotion)、利润 (profit)
ア.en: price, product, promotion, profit

イ.zh: 价格 (price)、产品 (product)、销售促进 (promotion)、渠道 (place)
イ.en: price, product, promotion, place

ウ.zh: 价格 (price)、产品 (product)、利润 (profit)、渠道 (place)
ウ.en: price, product, profit, place

エ.zh: 产品 (product)、销售促进 (promotion)、利润 (profit)、渠道 (place)
エ.en: product, promotion, profit, place

stem.en: Which law protects a new business model that uses the internet?

ア.en: Design Act

イ.zh: 商标法
イ.en: Trademark Act

ウ.zh: 著作权法
ウ.en: Copyright Act

エ.zh: 专利法
エ.en: Patent Act

stem.en: Which system is introduced with the aim of speeding up and reducing the labor of in-house approval application procedures?

ア.en: MRP system

イ.en: POS system

2013h25h-q013.stem_jp_clean: 著作権の帰属に関する説明のうち, 適切なものはどれか。ここで, 著作権に関する特段の契約や取決めはないものとする。

stem.zh: 关于著作权归属的说明中，恰当的是哪一项？这里假设不存在关于著作权的特别合同或约定。
stem.en: Which of the following statements about the ownership of copyright is appropriate? Here, assume that there is no special contract or arrangement concerning the copyright.

ア.zh: 电影的著作权仅归属于其原著作者。
ア.en: The copyright of a movie belongs solely to its original author.

イ.zh: 即使是没有讲稿的即兴演讲，其著作权也归属于演讲者。
イ.en: Even for an improvised lecture without a manuscript, the copyright belongs to the lecturer.

ウ.zh: 宪法、法令以及法院的判决，其著作权归属于国家或地方公共团体。
ウ.en: The copyright of the constitution, laws, and court judgments belongs to the state or local public bodies.

エ.zh: 报纸连载小说的著作权不归属于原著作者，而归属于报社。
エ.en: The copyright of a novel serialized in a newspaper belongs to the newspaper company, not to the original author.

stem.zh: 作为全面质量管理（TQM 或 TQC）的重要手法之一的方针管理，下列哪项说明是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of policy management (hoshin kanri), one of the important techniques of Total Quality Management (TQM) or Total Quality Control (TQC)?

ア.zh: 为衡量企业战略的执行状况，从财务、客户、业务流程、学习与成长这四个视角设定指标，并对目标进行管理的活动
ア.en: An activity that sets indicators from four perspectives—financial, customer, business process, and learning and growth—to measure the execution status of corporate strategy, and manages targets accordingly

イ.zh: 梳理出用于业务改进的课题，向已在着手解决该课题的最优秀的其他公司学习，并应用到本公司的活动
イ.en: An activity that identifies issues for business improvement, learns from the best other companies that are already working on those issues, and applies what is learned to one's own company

ウ.zh: 将经营高层的目标依次展开为事业部、部、科等各层级的目标，并将其衔接到实施计划上，为达成目标而持续推进改进的活动
ウ.en: An activity that successively cascades top management's goals down to the goals of divisions, departments, sections, and so on, links them to implementation plans, and continuously advances improvement to achieve the goals

エ.zh: 为解决现场发生的问题，由相关职场的人员组成团队，制定计划并推进改进的活动
エ.en: An activity in which people from the relevant workplaces form a team to solve problems occurring on the front line, draw up a plan, and advance improvement

stem.zh: 关于在 PC 等产品生产中使用的 BTO 的说明，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of BTO, which is used in the production of PCs and similar products?

ア.zh: 让其他公司组装贴有本公司标志的产品。
ア.en: Having another company assemble products bearing your own company's logo.

イ.zh: 不以成品形式而是以零部件形式保存产品，在收到客户订单后，根据订单内容组装相应的产品。
イ.en: Keeping products stored as parts rather than as finished goods, and after receiving a customer's order, assembling the product according to the order's specifications.

ウ.zh: 在所需的时期采购所需数量的原材料和零部件，从而尽可能不持有生产工序之间的库存来进行生产。
ウ.en: Procuring the required amount of raw materials and parts at the required time, thereby producing while holding as little in-process inventory between production processes as possible.

エ.zh: 由一名作业人员单独组装一件产品。
エ.en: Having a single worker assemble one product alone.

stem.zh: 在制定信息系统整体最优化规划时，为确保与经营战略保持一致而必需的事项，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: When formulating a plan for the overall optimization of an information system, which of the following is the most appropriate measure necessary to ensure alignment with the management strategy?

ア.zh: 向一线员工进行访谈听取意见
ア.en: Conducting interviews with frontline employees

イ.zh: 编制信息系统的提案邀请书（RFP）
イ.en: Preparing the request for proposal (RFP) for the information system

ウ.zh: 理解中期经营计划书
ウ.en: Understanding the medium-term management plan

エ.zh: 查阅独立审计人出具的审计报告书
エ.en: Reviewing the audit report issued by the independent auditor

stem.zh: 属于 BtoE 交易的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following corresponds to a BtoE transaction?

ア.zh: 在互联网上举办的拍卖中，参与者从其他参与者处购买商品。
ア.en: In an auction held on the internet, a participant purchases goods from another participant.

イ.zh: 企业向本公司员工提供利用互联网的面向员工的福利、教育等服务。
イ.en: A company provides its own employees with internet-based services such as employee benefits and education.

ウ.zh: 汽车制造商利用互联网，从世界各地的供应商处采购零部件和材料。
ウ.en: An automaker uses the internet to procure parts and materials from vendors around the world.

エ.zh: 旅行社利用互联网，面向消费者进行活动宣传和门票的预订销售。
エ.en: A travel agency uses the internet to provide consumers with campaign information and the reservation sales of tickets.

2013h25h-q018.stem_jp_clean: JAN コードを構成するメーカコードと商品アイテムコードの設定方法として，適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 关于构成 JAN 码的厂商代码与商品项目代码的设定方法，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the appropriate way to assign the manufacturer code and the item code that make up a JAN code?

ア.zh: 厂商代码——向公共机构申请取得，商品项目代码——向公共机构申请取得
ア.en: Manufacturer code: obtained by applying to a public institution; item code: obtained by applying to a public institution

イ.zh: 厂商代码——向公共机构申请取得，商品项目代码——由厂商自行分配
イ.en: Manufacturer code: obtained by applying to a public institution; item code: assigned by the manufacturer

ウ.zh: 厂商代码——由厂商自行分配，商品项目代码——向公共机构申请取得
ウ.en: Manufacturer code: assigned by the manufacturer; item code: obtained by applying to a public institution

エ.zh: 厂商代码——由厂商自行分配，商品项目代码——由厂商自行分配
エ.en: Manufacturer code: assigned by the manufacturer; item code: assigned by the manufacturer

2013h25h-q019.stem_jp_clean:
技術開発戦略立案の作業を①～⑤の順で行う場合，a に当てはまるものはどれか。

| 作業順番 | 作業項目 |
|---|---|
| ① | 経営戦略に関連する社内外の技術の抽出 |
| ② | a |
| ③ | 競争優位の構築に役立つ技術の見極め |
| ④ | 自社技術力の評価と強化分野の選定 |
| ⑤ | 開発の優先順位決定と開発ロードマップの作成 |

stem.zh:
按照①～⑤的顺序开展技术开发战略的制定工作时，应填入 a 的是哪一项？

| 工作顺序 | 工作项目 |
|---|---|
| ① | 抽取与经营战略相关的公司内外技术 |
| ② | a |
| ③ | 甄别有助于确立竞争优势的技术 |
| ④ | 评估自有技术实力并选定强化领域 |
| ⑤ | 确定开发优先顺序并编制开发路线图 |
stem.en:
When the work of formulating a technology development strategy is carried out in the order ① to ⑤, which item should be placed in a?

| Work order | Work item |
|---|---|
| ① | Identifying internal and external technologies related to the management strategy |
| ② | a |
| ③ | Identifying technologies useful for establishing competitive advantage |
| ④ | Evaluating the company's own technological capabilities and selecting areas to strengthen |
| ⑤ | Determining development priorities and creating a development roadmap |

ア.zh: 建立技术开发推进体制
ア.en: Establishing a technology development promotion structure

イ.zh: 预测技术与环境的变化
イ.en: Forecasting changes in technology and the environment

ウ.zh: 设定新产品的销售额与利润目标
ウ.en: Setting sales and profit targets for new products

エ.zh: 实施试销（测试营销）
エ.en: Conducting test marketing

2013h25h-q020.stem_jp_clean: 労働者派遣に関連する記述のうち, 派遣先の企業が行わなければならないことはどれか。

stem.zh: 下列与劳动者派遣相关的描述中, 接受派遣的企业（派遣目的地企业）必须做的是哪一项?
stem.en: Among the following statements related to worker dispatch, which is something the company receiving the dispatched workers (the client company) must do?

ア.zh: 对派遣劳动者提出的投诉进行恰当且迅速的处理
ア.en: Appropriate and prompt handling of complaints from dispatched workers

イ.zh: 向派遣劳动者明示薪资和工作时间
イ.en: Clearly indicating wages and working hours to dispatched workers

ウ.zh: 为派遣劳动者提供职业生涯方面的建议与指导
ウ.en: Providing advice and guidance on the careers of dispatched workers

エ.zh: 为谋求派遣劳动者就业稳定而采取必要的措施
エ.en: Taking necessary measures to ensure the employment stability of dispatched workers

2013h25h-q021.stem_jp_clean: 電子レンジ, 炊飯器などの家電製品に組み込まれているコンピュータの総称として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 对嵌入微波炉、电饭煲等家用电器中的计算机的总称，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which is the appropriate general term for the computers embedded in home appliances such as microwave ovens and rice cookers?

ア.zh: 超级计算机
ア.en: Supercomputer

イ.zh: 个人计算机
イ.en: Personal computer

ウ.zh: 微型计算机
ウ.en: Microcomputer

エ.zh: 小型计算机
エ.en: Minicomputer

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是对事业部制组织的说明？
stem.en: Which of the following describes a divisional organization (business-unit-based structure)?

ア.zh: 组织成员同时隶属于自己所专长的职能部门和负责执行特定业务的部门两边的组织。
ア.en: An organization in which each member belongs to both the functional department of their specialty and the department that carries out a specific business.

イ.zh: 按照采购、生产、销售、财务等工作性质来划分部门而编成的组织。
イ.en: An organization in which departments are formed according to the nature of the work, such as purchasing, production, sales, and finance.

ウ.zh: 围绕特定课题，从各部门抽调专家组成，并设定期限和目标来开展活动的临时性且灵活的组织。
ウ.en: A temporary and flexible organization formed by gathering specialists from each department under a specific task, with a defined period and goal for its activities.

エ.zh: 通过按产品、按客户或按地区拥有利润责任及业务执行所需的各项职能，从而能够开展自我完结式经营活动的组织。
エ.en: An organization that can carry out self-contained management activities by holding profit responsibility and the functions needed to perform operations, organized by product, by customer, or by region.

2013h25h-q023.stem_jp_clean: ソフトウェアライフサイクルを, 企画, 要件定義, 開発, 運用のプロセスに区分したとき, 要件定義プロセスで明確にする項目はどれか。

stem.zh: 将软件生命周期划分为策划、需求定义、开发、运行这几个过程时，在需求定义过程中需要明确的项目是哪一个？
stem.en: When the software lifecycle is divided into the processes of planning, requirements definition, development, and operation, which item is the one to be clarified in the requirements definition process?

ア.zh: 开发系统的目的
ア.en: The purpose of developing the system

イ.zh: 每个软件配置项的功能与能力
イ.en: The function and capability of each software configuration item

ウ.zh: 数据库的结构
ウ.en: The structure of the database

エ.zh: 利益相关方的需要与诉求事项
エ.en: The needs and requests of stakeholders

stem.zh: 关于 SWOT 分析的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of SWOT analysis?

ア.zh: 通过分析企业所处外部环境中潜在的机会与威胁、以及企业自身拥有的优势与劣势，从而推导出企业今后活动方向的手法。
ア.en: A technique that derives the future direction of corporate activities by analyzing the opportunities and threats latent in the company's external environment, together with the company's own strengths and weaknesses.

イ.zh: 从财务视角、客户视角、业务流程视角、学习与成长视角，对企业的业绩进行均衡评价与分析的手法。
イ.en: A technique that evaluates and analyzes a company's performance in a balanced way from the financial perspective, the customer perspective, the business process perspective, and the learning and growth perspective.

ウ.zh: 从自家公司的活动最终为客户创造出何种价值、以及它能否令客户满意的角度，来设计企业活动的手法。
ウ.en: A technique that designs corporate activities from the viewpoint of what value the company's own activities ultimately create for customers and whether it can satisfy them.

エ.zh: 以市场增长率和市场份额这两个定量项目所构成的矩阵来标绘各项业务，从而实现经营资源配置最优化的手法。
エ.en: A technique that plots businesses on a matrix formed by two quantitative items, market growth rate and market share, in order to optimize the allocation of management resources.

stem.zh: 为了给其他公司造成损害，取得并使用与其他公司服务名称相类似的域名，禁止此类行为的法律是哪一个？
stem.en: Which law prohibits acts such as acquiring and using a domain name similar to another company's service name with the intent of causing damage to that company?

ア.zh: 个人信息保护法
ア.en: Act on the Protection of Personal Information

イ.zh: 电气通信事业法
イ.en: Telecommunications Business Act

ウ.zh: 禁止非法访问行为等相关法律
ウ.en: Act on Prohibition of Unauthorized Computer Access

エ.zh: 反不正当竞争法
エ.en: Unfair Competition Prevention Act

stem.zh:
下列哪一项仅列出且完整列出了需要经过股东大会决议的事项？
a 选任监事。 b 决定企业合并。
c 执行经营战略。 d 选任董事。
stem.en:
Which one lists all and only the matters that require a resolution of the shareholders' meeting?
a Appoint a company auditor. b Decide on a corporate merger.
c Execute the business strategy. d Appoint a director.

ア.zh: a、b、d
ア.en: a, b, d

イ.zh: a、c
イ.en: a, c

ウ.zh: b
ウ.en: b

エ.zh: c、d
エ.en: c, d

2013h25h-q027.stem_jp_clean:
個人情報保護法における個人情報に該当するものだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a 顔がはっきり映った防犯カメラの映像
b 従業員名が記載された人事考課表
c 話者が判別できる通話記録の音声

stem.zh:
在《个人信息保护法》中，仅列出全部属于个人信息的项目的是哪一个？
a 清晰拍到人脸的监控摄像头影像
b 记载了员工姓名的人事考核表
c 能够辨别说话者身份的通话记录录音
stem.en:
Under the Act on the Protection of Personal Information, which option lists all and only the items that qualify as personal information?
a Surveillance camera footage that clearly shows a person's face
b A personnel evaluation sheet on which an employee's name is recorded
c Audio of a call recording from which the speaker can be identified

ア.zh: a、b、c
ア.en: a, b, c

イ.zh: a、c
イ.en: a, c

ウ.zh: b
ウ.en: b

エ.zh: 无符合项
エ.en: None of them

stem.zh:
关于下表所示 A 公司损益变化的描述中，恰当的是哪一项？

单位 亿日元

| | 上期 | 本期 |
|---|---|---|
| 销售额 | 2,000 | 2,000 |
| 销售成本 | 850 | 900 |
| 销售费用及一般管理费用 | 950 | 900 |
| 营业外收益 | 10 | 20 |
| 营业外费用 | 20 | 10 |
stem.en:
Among the following statements about the change in Company A's profit and loss shown in the table, which one is appropriate?

Unit: hundred million yen

| | Previous period | Current period |
|---|---|---|
| Sales | 2,000 | 2,000 |
| Cost of sales | 850 | 900 |
| Selling, general and administrative expenses | 950 | 900 |
| Non-operating income | 10 | 20 |
| Non-operating expenses | 20 | 10 |

ア.zh: 毛利润减少，经常利润没有变化。
ア.en: Gross profit decreased, and ordinary profit was unchanged.

イ.zh: 毛利润没有变化，营业利润减少。
イ.en: Gross profit was unchanged, and operating profit decreased.

ウ.zh: 营业利润减少，经常利润没有变化。
ウ.en: Operating profit decreased, and ordinary profit was unchanged.

エ.zh: 营业利润没有变化，经常利润增加。
エ.en: Operating profit was unchanged, and ordinary profit increased.

stem.zh: 在价值工程中，定义价值的两个要素是哪一项？
stem.en: In Value Engineering, which pair are the two elements that define value?

ア.zh: 毛利与销售成本
ア.en: Gross profit and cost of sales

イ.zh: 功能与成本
イ.en: Function and cost

ウ.zh: 计划与实绩
ウ.en: Plan and actual results

エ.zh: 固定成本与变动成本
エ.en: Fixed cost and variable cost

2013h25h-q030.stem_jp_clean: 情報システムに蓄積されたデータを分析し,業務に活用することを目標としているが,社員の経験不足のために進んでいない。目標の実現に向けての優先度の高い取組みとして,最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 目标是分析信息系统中积累的数据并将其应用于业务,但由于员工经验不足,工作进展不顺利。为实现该目标,作为优先度最高的举措,最恰当的是哪一项?
stem.en: The goal is to analyze the data accumulated in the information system and apply it to business operations, but progress is not being made because employees lack experience. Which of the following is the most appropriate high-priority initiative for achieving this goal?

ア.zh: 在各部门各配置一台用于分析的高性能 PC。
ア.en: Install one high-performance PC for analysis in each department.

イ.zh: 提前可用于分析的数据的提供时间。
イ.en: Make the data available for analysis at an earlier time.

ウ.zh: 提升用于分析的软件的性能。
ウ.en: Improve the performance of the software used for analysis.

エ.zh: 提供分析的典型案例和分析用模板。
エ.en: Provide representative examples of analysis and templates for analysis.

2013h25h-q031.stem_jp_clean: IT統制は, ITに係る全般統制や業務処理統制などに分類される。全般統制はそれぞれの業務処理統制が有効に機能する環境を保証する統制活動のことをいい, 業務処理統制は業務を管理するシステムにおいて承認された業務が全て正確に処理, 記録されることを確保するための統制活動のことをいう。統制活動に関する記述のうち, 全般統制に当たるものはどれか。

stem.zh: IT控制可分为与IT相关的总体控制(全般控制)和业务处理控制等。总体控制是指为保证各项业务处理控制能够有效发挥作用的环境而进行的控制活动；业务处理控制是指为确保在管理业务的系统中已被批准的业务全部都被准确地处理、记录而进行的控制活动。在以下关于控制活动的描述中，属于总体控制的是哪一项？
stem.en: IT controls are classified into general controls and application (business-process) controls related to IT. General controls are control activities that ensure an environment in which each application control functions effectively, while application controls are control activities that ensure that all approved operations are accurately processed and recorded in the system that manages the operations. Among the following descriptions of control activities, which one corresponds to a general control?

ア.zh: 全公司通用的系统开发规程
ア.en: A system development standard used in common across the entire company

イ.zh: 全公司通用的人事系统的使用范围限定方法
イ.en: A method for limiting the scope of use of the HR system used in common across the entire company

ウ.zh: 全公司通用的财务(经理)系统的主数据的维护管理方法
ウ.en: A method for maintaining and managing the master data of the accounting system used in common across the entire company

エ.zh: 全公司通用的采购系统的输入错误修正手续
エ.en: A procedure for correcting input errors in the purchasing system used in common across the entire company

2013h25h-q032.stem_jp_clean: 実環境と同様のハードウェア, ソフトウェアを準備し, 端末からの問合せのレスポンスタイムが目標値に収まることを検証した。このテストはどれか。

stem.zh: 准备了与实际运行环境相同的硬件和软件，验证从终端发起查询的响应时间是否控制在目标值以内。这属于哪种测试？
stem.en: Hardware and software identical to the production environment were prepared, and it was verified that the response time of queries from terminals stayed within the target value. Which test is this?

ア.zh: 系统测试
ア.en: System testing

イ.zh: 软件集成测试
イ.en: Software integration testing

ウ.zh: 单元测试
ウ.en: Unit testing

エ.zh: 白盒测试
エ.en: White-box testing

stem.zh: 系统开发流程包括系统需求定义、系统设计、编程、测试和软件验收。在新系统的开发中，应在开发初期阶段作为系统需求定义的是哪一项？
stem.en: The system development process includes system requirements definition, system design, programming, testing, and software acceptance. In the development of a new system, which item should be defined as a system requirement in the early stage of development?

ア.zh: 系统的设备配置
ア.en: The system's hardware configuration

イ.zh: 系统的开发标准
イ.en: The system's development standards

ウ.zh: 系统的对象范围
ウ.en: The system's scope (target range)

エ.zh: 系统的测试计划
エ.en: The system's test plan

2013h25h-q034.stem_jp_clean: プロジェクトの人的資源の割当てなどを計画書にまとめた。計画書をまとめる際の考慮すべき事項に関する記述のうち, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 将项目的人力资源分配等内容整理成了计划书。关于整理该计划书时应考虑的事项的描述中，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: The allocation of human resources for a project and related matters were compiled into a plan document. Which of the following statements about the points to consider when compiling this plan document is the most appropriate?

ア.zh: 使每位项目成员的工作时间总和在整个项目期间内保持相同。
ア.en: Make the total work hours of each project member the same throughout the entire project period.

イ.zh: 由于目的是在项目开始时确保人员，因此不考虑项目执行过程中成员离任时的应对。
イ.en: Since the goal is to secure personnel at the start of the project, do not consider how to handle a member's departure during project execution.

ウ.zh: 由于项目成功最为重要，因此不考虑每位项目成员劳动时间的上限。
ウ.en: Since the success of the project is most important, do not consider the upper limit of each project member's working hours.

エ.zh: 使全体项目成员都能明确把握各自的角色和职责。
エ.en: Ensure that all project members can clearly understand their respective roles and responsibilities.

2013h25h-q035.stem_jp_clean: ソフトウェアの受入れ検収以降, 一定期間内に発見された欠陥に対して, 開発側が無償で修正を行ったり損害賠償責任を負ったりすることを何と呼ぶか。

stem.zh: 在软件验收交付之后，对于在一定期间内发现的缺陷，开发方需无偿进行修复或承担损害赔偿责任，这称为什么？
stem.en: After software acceptance inspection, the developer must repair defects found within a certain period free of charge or bear liability for damages. What is this called?

ア.zh: 瑕疵担保责任
ア.en: Warranty against defects (defect liability)

イ.zh: 服务级别协议（SLA）
イ.en: Service Level Agreement (SLA)

ウ.zh: 系统审计
ウ.en: System audit

エ.zh: 预防性维护
エ.en: Preventive maintenance

stem.zh: 项目的参与成员之间需要进行一对一的信息传递。此时，关于项目参与成员数与进行信息传递所需路径数之间关系的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Members participating in a project need to exchange information on a one-to-one basis. Which of the following is an appropriate description of the relationship between the number of participating members and the number of communication paths required to exchange information?

ア.zh: 当参与成员增加1人时，路径数的增量随原有参与成员越多而越大。
ア.en: When the number of participating members increases by one, the increase in the number of paths becomes larger as the original number of members is greater.

イ.zh: 参与成员每增加1人，路径数必定增加一条。
イ.en: When the number of participating members increases by one, the number of paths always increases by exactly one.

ウ.zh: 参与成员数 x 与路径数 y 的关系可用 y＝x 表示。
ウ.en: The relationship between the number of participating members x and the number of paths y is expressed as y＝x.

エ.zh: 参与成员数 x 与路径数 y 的关系可用 y＝x² 表示。
エ.en: The relationship between the number of participating members x and the number of paths y is expressed as y＝x².

stem.zh: 关于白盒测试的测试用例编写，下列描述中恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following statements about creating test cases for white-box testing is appropriate?

ア.zh: 对于输入条件为数值的项目，设置字符数据来编写测试用例。
ア.en: For an item whose input condition is numeric, set character data to create the test case.

イ.zh: 用关系图表示输入数据与输出数据，并将其有效的组合作为测试用例来编写。
イ.en: Express the input data and output data with a relationship graph, and create test cases from their valid combinations.

ウ.zh: 在输入人体重的测试中，将上限值设为 399 kg、下限值设为 599 g 来编写测试用例。
ウ.en: In a test for inputting a person's weight, set the upper limit to 399 kg and the lower limit to 599 g to create the test case.

エ.zh: 编写测试用例，使程序的所有分支路径都至少执行一次。
エ.en: Create test cases so that all branch paths of the program are executed at least once.

2013h25h-q038.stem_jp_clean:
プロジェクトに関する変更項目 a〜c のうち, プロジェクト・スコープでの変更管理の対象項目だけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a 該当プロジェクト中に発生する要件に関係する関連法規の変更
b 顧客要求事項の変更
c プロジェクトメンバの所属部署名の変更

stem.zh:
在与项目相关的变更项 a~c 中，仅列出全部属于项目范围变更管理对象的项是哪一项？
a 与该项目中产生的需求相关的相关法规的变更
b 客户需求事项的变更
c 项目成员所属部门名称的变更
stem.en:
Among the project-related change items a through c, which option lists all and only the items that are subject to change management within the project scope?
a Changes to relevant laws and regulations related to requirements arising during the project
b Changes to customer requirements
c Changes to the department name to which a project member belongs

ア.zh: a
ア.en: a

イ.zh: a, b
イ.en: a, b

ウ.zh: a, b, c
ウ.en: a, b, c

エ.zh: b, c
エ.en: b, c

stem.zh:
支持多个项目之间的协调以及各个项目管理工作的组织称为项目管理办公室。关于项目管理办公室职责的记述 a～c 中，仅列出全部恰当项的是哪一项？
a 对各个项目提供资金等财务方面的支持。
b 进行负责人员的调配等组织共享资源的优化。
c 支持项目经理的工作。
stem.en:
An organization that supports coordination among multiple projects and the management of each individual project is called a Project Management Office. Among the descriptions a to c regarding the roles of a Project Management Office, which one lists all and only the appropriate ones?
a It provides financial support such as funding to each individual project.
b It optimizes the organization's shared resources, such as adjusting the assignment of personnel.
c It supports the work of the project manager.

ア.zh: a, b
ア.en: a, b

イ.zh: a, b, c
イ.en: a, b, c

ウ.zh: b, c
ウ.en: b, c

エ.zh: c
エ.en: c

stem.zh: 在系统开发中，共通框架（Common Frame）的目的，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate purpose of the common frame (Common Frame / SLCP) in system development?

ア.zh: 提供有关计算机系统运行与管理业务的体系化指南。
ア.en: It provides systematized guidelines for the operation and management work of computer systems.

イ.zh: 针对企业之间等场合下术语及其含义各不相同的情况，提供一把帮助彼此相互理解的共通标尺。
イ.en: Anticipating that terms and their meanings differ between businesses and the like, it provides a common yardstick to aid mutual understanding.

ウ.zh: 提供在系统开发时从管理和技术两方面确保组织信息安全的对策。
ウ.en: It provides measures, in both management and technical aspects, for ensuring an organization's information security during system development.

エ.zh: 将项目管理中所需的知识体系化后加以提供。
エ.en: It systematizes and provides the knowledge needed in project management.

2013h25h-q041.stem_jp_clean:
システム開発における保守プロセスの目的に関する説明として, 次の記述中の a, b に入れる字句の適切な組合せはどれか。
保守プロセスは, 障害への対応, 性能の改善などを行うために, [a] のシステムやソフトウェアを [b] すること, 又は変更された環境に適合させることを目的とする。

stem.zh:
关于系统开发中维护过程的目的的说明，下列叙述中填入 a、b 处字句的恰当组合是哪一个？
维护过程的目的是：为了应对故障、改善性能等，对 [a] 的系统或软件进行 [b]，或者使其适应已变更的环境。
stem.en:
Which is the appropriate combination of words to fill in blanks a and b in the following description regarding the purpose of the maintenance process in system development?
The purpose of the maintenance process is, in order to handle failures, improve performance, and so on, to [b] a system or software that is [a], or to make it conform to a changed environment.

ア.zh: a-交付前，b-运行
ア.en: a-before delivery, b-operate

イ.zh: a-交付前，b-修改
イ.en: a-before delivery, b-modify

ウ.zh: a-交付后，b-运行
ウ.en: a-after delivery, b-operate

エ.zh: a-交付后，b-修改
エ.en: a-after delivery, b-modify

2013h25h-q042.stem_jp_clean: ソフトウェア詳細設計の結果, ソフトウェア仕様書を作成した。この結果を受けて開発の次工程を担当する者は誰か。

stem.zh: 在软件详细设计完成后，编写了软件规格说明书。承接这一成果、负责开发下一工序的人是谁？
stem.en: As a result of software detailed design, a software specification document was created. Who is responsible for the next development process that follows this result?

ア.zh: 系统审计员
ア.en: System auditor

イ.zh: 系统运维人员
イ.en: System operator

ウ.zh: 系统用户
ウ.en: System user

エ.zh: 程序员
エ.en: Programmer

stem.zh:
正在制定将于次年度 X 年 4 月开始的项目的风险应对计划。在假定存在下表所示四个风险的情况下，应对优先级被认为最高的是哪一个？此处，优先级要综合考虑风险的发生概率与影响程度；并且，若优先级相同，则对应对期限临近的风险尽早进行应对——按此标准进行评价。

| 风险 | 预计风险显现的时期 | 风险的发生概率 | 风险显现时的损失 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 风险1 | X+1 年 4 月 1 日 | 0.6 | 6,000 万日元 |
| 风险2 | X 年 7 月 1 日 | 0.4 | 9,000 万日元 |
| 风险3 | X 年 7 月 1 日 | 0.1 | 1,000 万日元 |
| 风险4 | X+1 年 3 月 1 日 | 0.5 | 7,000 万日元 |
stem.en:
A risk response plan is being developed for a project that starts in April of year X, the following fiscal year. Given that the four risks shown in the table are assumed, which one is considered to have the highest priority for response? Here, priority is determined by taking into account each risk's probability of occurrence and its impact; and if the priorities are the same, the evaluation is performed such that a risk whose response deadline is approaching is addressed as soon as possible.

| Risk | Expected time the risk materializes | Probability of occurrence | Loss if the risk materializes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Risk 1 | April 1, year X+1 | 0.6 | 60 million yen |
| Risk 2 | July 1, year X | 0.4 | 90 million yen |
| Risk 3 | July 1, year X | 0.1 | 10 million yen |
| Risk 4 | March 1, year X+1 | 0.5 | 70 million yen |

ア.zh: 风险1
ア.en: Risk 1

イ.zh: 风险2
イ.en: Risk 2

ウ.zh: 风险3
ウ.en: Risk 3

エ.zh: 风险4
エ.en: Risk 4

2013h25h-q045.stem_jp_clean: 事業継続計画 (BCP) における情報システムに関するファシリティマネジメントの施策のうち, 大地震によってデータセンタが長期間停止することを想定した施策はどれか。

stem.zh: 在业务连续性计划 (BCP) 中, 关于信息系统的设施管理措施里, 假设因大地震导致数据中心长期停止运行而采取的措施是哪一项?
stem.en: Among the facility management measures for information systems in a business continuity plan (BCP), which one assumes that a major earthquake causes the data center to stop operating for a long period?

ア.zh: 将服务器配置在高层楼层, 保护服务器免受海啸等水淹的影响。
ア.en: Place servers on a high floor to protect them from flooding such as tsunamis.

イ.zh: 为数据中心内的服务器连接 UPS。
イ.en: Connect a UPS to the servers in the data center.

ウ.zh: 对数据中心内的电源和线路等各种设备进行双重化。
ウ.en: Duplicate (make redundant) various facilities in the data center, such as power supplies and lines.

エ.zh: 在远程地点设置定期进行数据同步的备份中心。
エ.en: Set up a backup center at a remote location that periodically synchronizes data.

stem.zh: 将软件的质量特性分类为功能性、易用性、可靠性、可移植性等时，符合功能性的是哪一项？
stem.en: When software quality characteristics are classified into categories such as functionality, usability, reliability, and portability, which one corresponds to functionality?

ア.zh: 故障发生时能够将数据恢复到故障前的状态。
ア.en: When a failure occurs, data can be recovered to the state it was in before the failure.

イ.zh: 能够按照规格说明书进行操作，并获得恰当的执行结果。
イ.en: Operations can be performed as specified in the specification document, and appropriate execution results are obtained.

ウ.zh: 也能够在其他操作系统环境下运行。
ウ.en: It can also run in other OS environments.

エ.zh: 使用者达到熟练所需的时间较短。
エ.en: The time required for users to become proficient is short.

ア.zh: 系统审计人员的审计能力

イ.zh: 系统审计人员的实务经验

エ.zh: 系统审计人员的演示能力
エ.en: The presentation skills of the systems auditor

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是对功能点法的说明？
stem.en: Which of the following describes the Function Point method?

ア.zh: 基于外部输入、外部输出等功能的数量与难易度来估算开发规模。
ア.en: Estimates the development scale based on the number and difficulty of functions such as external inputs and external outputs.

イ.zh: 基于过去同类项目的实绩来估算开发规模。
イ.en: Estimates the development scale based on the actual results of past similar projects.

ウ.zh: 基于软件源代码的行数来估算工时。
ウ.en: Estimates the effort (man-hours) based on the number of lines of the software's source code.

エ.zh: 将项目的工作分解为最细的作业单元，分别估算各自的工时，再汇总从而估算出整体的工时。
エ.en: Estimates the total effort by breaking the project's work down into the most detailed tasks, estimating the effort for each, and aggregating them.

stem.zh: 在按照系统需求定义、外部设计、内部设计、编程的顺序推进系统开发时，定义画面布局和报表样式的工序中，最恰当的是哪一个？
stem.en: When system development proceeds in the order of system requirements definition, external design, internal design, and programming, which is the most appropriate process for defining the screen layout and the format of reports?

ア.zh: 系统需求定义
ア.en: System requirements definition

イ.zh: 外部设计
イ.en: External design

ウ.zh: 内部设计
ウ.en: Internal design

エ.zh: 编程
エ.en: Programming

stem.zh: 在系统开发的各个节点上，对整个项目所需的成本进行了估算。估算精度最高的时间点是哪一个？
stem.en: At each milestone of system development, an estimate of the total project cost was made. At which point in time is the estimate the most accurate?

ア.zh: 系统化规划时
ア.en: At the time of system planning

イ.zh: 设计结束时
イ.en: At the end of design

ウ.zh: 编程结束时
ウ.en: At the end of programming

エ.zh: 需求确定时
エ.en: At the time requirements are finalized

stem.zh: 关于系统审计实施内容的描述中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of how a systems audit is carried out?

ア.zh: 由质量管理负责人构建并运营基于 ISO 9001 的质量管理体系。
ア.en: The quality control manager builds and operates a quality management system based on ISO 9001.

イ.zh: 由开发人员自己测试其所开发系统的内容。
イ.en: Developers test the contents of the systems they themselves developed.

ウ.zh: 由独立于审计对象的第三方评价信息系统针对风险的控制措施是否得到适当的建立与运行。
ウ.en: A third party that is independent of the audited subject evaluates whether the controls against information system risks are appropriately established and operated.

エ.zh: 由系统管理员使用专用软件自行验证系统的安全漏洞。
エ.en: The system administrator uses dedicated software to verify the system's security holes by themselves.

2013h25h-q052.stem_jp_clean: DoS (Denial of Service) 攻撃の説明として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 关于 DoS（Denial of Service，拒绝服务）攻击的说明，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of a DoS (Denial of Service) attack?

ア.zh: 冒充他人，非法使用网络上的服务。
ア.en: Impersonating another person to illegitimately use services on a network.

イ.zh: 在通信路径上偷看他人的数据。
イ.en: Peeking at another person's data along a communication path.

ウ.zh: 大量发送电子邮件或 Web 请求等，使网络上的服务无法提供。
ウ.en: Sending large volumes of email, web requests, and the like to make services on a network unavailable.

エ.zh: 通过依次尝试字符组合来试图破解密码。
エ.en: Trying to crack a password by sequentially testing combinations of characters.

2013h25h-q053.stem_jp_clean: コンピュータを利用するとき、アルゴリズムは重要である。アルゴリズムの説明として、適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 使用计算机时，算法是很重要的。关于算法的说明，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: When using a computer, algorithms are important. Which is the appropriate description of an algorithm?

ア.zh: 把程序转换为计算机可直接执行的机器语言的软件
ア.en: Software that converts a program into machine language directly executable by a computer

イ.zh: 让计算机达成某一特定目的的处理步骤

ウ.zh: 用于向计算机指示一系列操作的人工语言的总称

stem.zh: 使用关系数据库创建“员工”表和“部门”表来管理员工信息。为“员工”表和“部门”表按需设置主键和外键，哪一种适当的组合是正确的？这里，员工必定隶属于“部门”表中存在的某个部门，并且在添加或更新员工数据时，利用参照约束来确保数据的完整性。
stem.en: A relational database is used to create an "Employee" table and a "Department" table to manage employee information. Which is the appropriate combination of the primary keys and foreign keys to be set, as needed, in the "Employee" table and the "Department" table? Here, every employee must belong to a department that exists in the "Department" table, and when adding or updating employee data, referential constraints are used to ensure data integrity.

ア.zh: 主键：“员工”表的员工代码、“部门”表的部门代码；外键：无
ア.en: Primary keys: employee code of the "Employee" table, department code of the "Department" table; foreign key: none

イ.zh: 主键：“员工”表的员工代码、“部门”表的部门代码；外键：“员工”表的部门代码
イ.en: Primary keys: employee code of the "Employee" table, department code of the "Department" table; foreign key: department code of the "Employee" table

ウ.zh: 主键：“部门”表的部门代码；外键：“员工”表的员工代码、“员工”表的部门代码
ウ.en: Primary key: department code of the "Department" table; foreign keys: employee code of the "Employee" table, department code of the "Employee" table

エ.zh: 主键：“员工”表的部门代码；外键：“员工”表的员工代码、“部门”表的部门代码
エ.en: Primary key: department code of the "Employee" table; foreign keys: employee code of the "Employee" table, department code of the "Department" table

stem.zh: 关于触摸屏的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of a touch panel?

ア.zh: 使用笔型或鼠标型的装置来指示屏幕上的位置，并使用用于检测位置的平板状装置进行操作。
ア.en: It is operated using a pen-shaped or mouse-shaped device to indicate a position on the screen, together with a flat tablet-like device for detecting the position.

イ.zh: 有电子式、静电式等方式，通过用手指等直接触摸屏幕来进行计算机的操作。
イ.en: It comes in types such as the electronic type and the electrostatic (capacitive) type, and the computer is operated by touching the screen directly with a finger or similar.

ウ.zh: 利用表面的触摸传感器识别手指的动作，通过像转动称为滚轮的圆盘状部件那样进行操作。
ウ.en: It recognizes finger movements using a surface touch sensor, and is operated as if turning a disk-like part called a wheel.

エ.zh: 通过用手指在平板状的输入装置上滑动，来操作屏幕上的鼠标指针等。
エ.en: It is operated by tracing a finger over a flat input device to move the mouse pointer and similar elements on the screen.

stem.zh: 在由 1 台 CPU 和 1 台输出设备构成的系统中，处理表中的三个作业。这三个作业在系统开始运行的时刻均已处于可处理状态。在 CPU 和输出设备各自上，均按作业 1、作业 2、作业 3 的顺序进行处理。CPU 和输出设备独立运行，但各作业的输出处理只有在该作业的 CPU 处理结束后才能开始执行。作业 3 的输出完成是在作业 1 的处理开始时刻起的多少秒后？
stem.en: In a system consisting of one CPU and one output device, the three jobs in the table are processed. At the moment the system starts operating, all three jobs are already in a ready-to-process state. On both the CPU and the output device, the jobs are processed in the order job 1, job 2, job 3. The CPU and the output device operate independently, but the output processing of each job can only begin after that job's CPU processing has finished. How many seconds after the start of job 1's processing does the output of job 3 complete?

stem.zh: 关于系统的用户认证技术的描述中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of user authentication technology for systems?

ア.zh: 将通过一次认证即可使用多个被许可的服务器或应用程序等的机制称为挑战-应答认证（challenge-response authentication）。
ア.en: A mechanism that allows a user to access multiple permitted servers, applications, and so on with a single authentication is called challenge-response authentication.

イ.zh: 将利用指纹、声纹等身体特征进行本人认证的机制称为单点登录（single sign-on）。
イ.en: A mechanism that performs identity authentication using physical characteristics such as fingerprints or voiceprints is called single sign-on.

ウ.zh: 将不记忆特定的数字或文字排列，而是记忆有关位置的信息，认证时在画面上显示的表格中，把自己记住的位置上排列的数字或文字作为口令输入的方式称为生物识别认证（biometrics authentication）。
ウ.en: A method in which the user memorizes information about positions rather than a specific sequence of numbers or characters, and at authentication time enters, as the password, the numbers or characters arranged at the memorized positions within a table displayed on the screen, is called biometrics authentication.

エ.zh: 将只能使用一次的认证用口令称为一次性口令（one-time password）。
エ.en: A password that can be used only once for authentication is called a one-time password.

2013h25h-q059.stem_jp_clean: クライアントサーバシステムにおいて、クライアント側には必要最低限の機能しかもたせず、サーバ側でアプリケーションソフトウェアやデータを集中管理するシステムはどれか。

stem.zh: 在客户机服务器系统中，客户端只具备必要的最低限度功能，而在服务器端集中管理应用软件和数据的系统是哪一个？

エ.en: Peer-to-peer system

stem.zh: 关于勒索软件的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of ransomware?

ア.zh: 检测病毒等威胁、保护计算机免受威胁并提高安全性的软件的总称。
ア.en: A general term for software that detects threats such as viruses, protects the computer from threats, and enhances its security.

イ.zh: 一旦感染就会擅自对文件或数据进行加密等操作，使其无法正常访问数据，并向用户索要恢复数据所需赎金的软件。
イ.en: Software that, once it infects a computer, arbitrarily encrypts files or data so that the data cannot be accessed normally, and demands a ransom from the user to restore it.

ウ.zh: 管理键盘输入、屏幕输出等输入输出功能，以及磁盘和内存管理等整个计算机系统的软件。
ウ.en: Software that manages input/output functions such as keyboard input and screen output, as well as the entire computer system including disk and memory management.

エ.zh: 辅助用户在计算机上输入文字的软件，例如将罗马字转换为平假名或片假名，或将假名转换为汉字等。
エ.en: Software that assists a user's text input on a computer, such as converting Roman letters into hiragana or katakana, or converting kana into kanji.

2013h25h-q063.stem_jp_clean: DRAM, ROM, SRAM, フラッシュメモリのうち, 電力供給が途絶えても内容が消えない不揮発性メモリはどれか。

stem.en: Among DRAM, ROM, SRAM, and flash memory, which of the following pairs consists only of non-volatile memories whose contents are not lost even when the power supply is cut off?

ア.zh: DRAM 和 SRAM
ア.en: DRAM and SRAM

イ.zh: DRAM 和闪存
イ.en: DRAM and flash memory

ウ.zh: ROM 和 SRAM
ウ.en: ROM and SRAM

エ.en: ROM and flash memory

stem.zh: 杀毒软件的恰当运用方法是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate way to operate anti-virus software?

ア.zh: 杀毒软件仅在对硬盘进行病毒检查时启动，检查结束后立即将其停止。
ア.en: Start the anti-virus software only when scanning the hard disk for viruses, and stop it immediately after the scan is finished.

イ.zh: 使用具有常驻检查功能（每次读写文件时都检查该文件是否混入了病毒等）的杀毒软件时，只要在引入时对整个硬盘检查一次，之后仅依靠常驻检查即可。
イ.en: When using anti-virus software that has a resident-scan function (checking each file for viruses, etc., whenever the file is read or written), it is sufficient to scan the entire hard disk once at installation and rely only on resident scanning thereafter.

ウ.zh: 引入之后也持续地更新病毒定义文件。
ウ.en: Continue to update the virus definition files even after installation.

エ.zh: 如果提供商（ISP）一侧已经进行了病毒检查，则无需在 PC 上安装杀毒软件。
エ.en: If virus checking is performed on the provider's (ISP's) side, there is no need to install anti-virus software on the PC.

stem.zh: 关于 PC 操作界面中使用的下拉菜单的描述，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of a pull-down menu used on a PC's operation screen?

ア.zh: 用于显示错误消息或输入少量数据。
ア.en: It is used to display error messages or to enter a small amount of data.

イ.zh: 从画面上显示的多个选项中选出所有需要的项。
イ.en: From multiple choices displayed on the screen, you select all the ones you need.

ウ.zh: 在键盘输入时，根据过去的输入历史预测并显示下一个输入内容。
ウ.en: During keyboard input, it predicts and displays the next input content based on past input history.

エ.zh: 点击标题部分后会显示选项的一览，从中选择一个。
エ.en: Clicking the title portion displays a list of choices, from which you select one.

2013h25h-q066.stem_jp_clean: PC の起動時に動作するプログラムの種類を BIOS (Basic Input Output System), OS, 常駐アプリケーションプログラムの三つに大別した場合, これらのプログラムを実行される順に並べたものはどれか。

stem.en: When the programs that run at PC startup are broadly classified into three types — BIOS (Basic Input Output System), the OS, and resident application programs — which of the following lists these programs in the order they are executed?

ア.zh: BIOS、OS、常驻应用程序
ア.en: BIOS, OS, resident application programs

イ.zh: OS、BIOS、常驻应用程序

stem.zh:
F 先生为了满足上司指示的事项，编写了一封向员工请求填写问卷的电子邮件正文。作为填入 a 处的描述，最恰当的是哪一个？
本次为了改善职场环境，决定实施满意度调查。
调查对象为全体员工。　a　。
截止日期为下个月的最后一天。请予以协助。
关于本事项的咨询，请联系人事部负责人 F。
stem.en:
In order to satisfy the items instructed by his superior, Mr. F composed the body of an email requesting employees to fill out a questionnaire. Which of the following is the most appropriate statement to insert in blank a?
This time, in order to improve the workplace environment, we have decided to conduct a satisfaction survey.
The target respondents are all employees.　a　.
The deadline is the last day of next month. We ask for your cooperation.
For inquiries regarding this matter, please contact F of the Human Resources Department.

ア.zh: 请确保填写到问卷文档中的内容没有错误
ア.en: Please make sure that there are no errors in the contents you fill in the questionnaire document

イ.zh: 在回答截止日期的 2 天前，将向尚未回答的人员发送催促邮件
イ.en: Two days before the response deadline, we will send a reminder email to those who have not responded

ウ.zh: 请在附件的问卷文档中填写回答，并将其作为附件附在本邮件的回复邮件中发送
ウ.en: Please fill in your answers in the attached questionnaire document, attach it to a reply to this email, and send it

エ.zh: 由于对象是全体员工，请务必遵守截止日期
エ.en: Since the target is all employees, please be sure to observe the deadline

2013h25h-q086.stem_jp_clean: 社員からアンケートを返信してもらう際に発生する可能性がある不都合を防ぐために, 全社員宛てにアンケートを送信する際のアドレスの設定方法として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 为了防止员工回复问卷时可能产生的不便，向全体员工发送问卷时，地址的设置方法以下哪项是恰当的？

ア.zh: 只在 BCC（密送）中设置全体员工的地址。
ア.en: Set all employees' addresses in BCC (blind carbon copy) only.

イ.zh: 只在 CC（抄送）中设置全体员工的地址。
イ.en: Set all employees' addresses in CC (carbon copy) only.

ウ.zh: 只在 TO（收件人）中设置全体员工的地址。
ウ.en: Set all employees' addresses in TO (recipient) only.

エ.zh: 在 TO（收件人）和 BCC（密送）中都设置全体员工的地址。
エ.en: Set all employees' addresses in both TO (recipient) and BCC (blind carbon copy).

2013h25h-q087.stem_jp_clean: F さんからの指示に基づいて, 回答者がメールに添付されたアンケート文書を使って回答する手順として, 適切なものはどれか。

ア.zh: 将附件保存到 PC。选择「回复邮件」，在所生成邮件的正文中填写问卷的回答结果，并附上已保存的文件后发送邮件。
ア.en: Save the attachment to the PC. Select "Reply to email," write the questionnaire results in the body of the created email, attach the saved file, and send the email.

イ.zh: 将附件保存到 PC。选择「回复邮件」，在所生成邮件的正文中填写问卷的回答结果，然后发送邮件。
イ.en: Save the attachment to the PC. Select "Reply to email," write the questionnaire results in the body of the created email, and send the email.

ウ.zh: 打开附件，填写对问卷的回答，并保存到 PC。选择「回复邮件」，在所生成的邮件中附上已保存的文件后发送邮件。
ウ.en: Open the attachment, write the answers to the questionnaire, and save it to the PC. Select "Reply to email," attach the saved file to the created email, and send the email.

エ.zh: 打开附件，填写对问卷的回答，并保存到 PC。新建一封邮件，将收件人设置为人事部，附上已保存的文件后发送。
エ.en: Open the attachment, write the answers to the questionnaire, and save it to the PC. Create a new email, set the recipient to the HR department, attach the saved file, and send it.

stem.zh: F 先生决定按照上司指示的事项来整理问卷文档。关于此时的问卷整理方法，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Mr. F decided to organize the survey documents according to the items instructed by his supervisor. Regarding the method of organizing the surveys in this situation, which one is appropriate?

ア.zh: 问卷的回复邮件在收件箱中新建一个文件夹来保管。附件以能够辨别回复者的方式，用员工姓名和员工编号作为文件名，在共享文件夹中按部门建立文件夹来保存。对于已保存文件的员工，在员工名单上做标记，并且每次都从收件箱中删除该邮件。
ア.en: Survey reply emails are stored by creating a new folder in the inbox. The attachments are saved by using the employee's name and employee number as the file name so that the respondent can be identified, creating department-specific folders within the shared folder. For employees whose files have been saved, a mark is placed on the employee list, and each time the email is deleted from the inbox.

イ.zh: 问卷的回复邮件在收件箱中新建一个文件夹来保管。附件以能够辨别回复者的方式，用员工姓名和员工编号作为文件名，在共享文件夹中按部门建立文件夹来保存。对于已保存文件的员工，在员工名单上做标记。
イ.en: Survey reply emails are stored by creating a new folder in the inbox. The attachments are saved by using the employee's name and employee number as the file name so that the respondent can be identified, creating department-specific folders within the shared folder. For employees whose files have been saved, a mark is placed on the employee list.

ウ.zh: 问卷的回复邮件在收件箱中新建一个文件夹来保管。附件以能够辨别部门的方式，用部门名称作为文件名，保存到共享文件夹中。对于已保存文件的员工，在员工名单上做标记。
ウ.en: Survey reply emails are stored by creating a new folder in the inbox. The attachments are saved to the shared folder by using the department name as the file name so that the department can be identified. For employees whose files have been saved, a mark is placed on the employee list.

エ.zh: 问卷的回复邮件保管在收件箱中。附件原样保存到共享文件夹中。对于已保存文件的员工，在员工名单上做标记。
エ.en: Survey reply emails are stored in the inbox. The attachments are saved to the shared folder as is. For employees whose files have been saved, a mark is placed on the employee list.

stem.en: If G Company's basic service is followed, which of the requirements of F Company's accounting department will be satisfied after the new system goes into operation?

2013h25h-q091.stem_jp_clean: G社の基本サービスで, 保守・運用に関するサービスの内容を, 時刻や時間などを定量的に定義して適切に示しているものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在 G 公司的基本服务中，将与维护、运行相关的服务内容用时刻或时长等加以定量定义并恰当展示的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among G Company's basic services, which one appropriately presents the content of maintenance and operation services by defining it quantitatively in terms of time of day, duration of time, and so on?

2013h25h-q092.stem_jp_clean: 保守, 運用に関する G 社の基本サービスでは, 経理部の新システムの利用及びサポートに関する要望を満たさない事項が幾つかある。その中の要望に対して内容を定量的に示して, 改善要望したい。要望として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在 G 公司关于维护、运行的基本服务中，有若干事项未能满足财务部对新系统的使用及支持方面的要求。希望针对其中的要求，定量地表述内容并提出改进要求。作为要求，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: In Company G's basic service for maintenance and operation, there are several items that do not satisfy the Accounting Department's requirements regarding the use and support of the new system. For one of these requirements, you want to state the content quantitatively and request an improvement. Which of the following is an appropriate requirement?

ア.zh: 希望在新系统发生故障时，在 24 小时以内完成恢复。
ア.en: When a failure occurs in the new system, we want recovery to be completed within 24 hours.

イ.zh: 希望迅速进行新系统故障的隔离定位与缺陷的修复。
イ.en: We want the isolation of new-system failures and the fixing of bugs to be carried out promptly.

ウ.zh: 希望通过提前一天提出申请，使新系统在夜间可使用至 22:00、节假日可在 9:00 至 17:00 之间使用，并能够应对咨询。
ウ.en: By making a request the previous day, we want to be able to use the new system at night until 22:00 and on holidays from 9:00 to 17:00, and to also have inquiries handled.

エ.zh: 希望准确无误地实施数据备份，并保管一周的备份数据。
エ.en: We want data backups to be performed without errors and one week's worth of backup data to be retained.

stem.zh: 图1的单元格 D3 中输入的计算公式，哪一个是恰当的？这里，单元格 D2 中输入了计算公式「D1+C2-B2」，且单元格 D3 的计算公式将被复制到单元格 D4〜D13 来使用。
stem.en: Which of the following is the appropriate formula entered in cell D3 of Figure 1? Here, cell D2 contains the formula "D1+C2-B2", and the formula in cell D3 is copied to cells D4 through D13 for use.

ア.zh: B3+C3
ア.en: B3+C3

エ.zh: 求和(B4〜B13)+求和(C2〜C3)
エ.en: SUM(B4〜B13)+SUM(C2〜C3)

stem.zh: 对于图2中以(a)所示折线可以读取的信息，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following can be read from the polyline indicated by (a) in Figure 2?

ア.zh: 可以了解今年销售额的累计值。
ア.en: It shows the cumulative total of this year's sales.

イ.zh: 可以了解与去年同期相比今年销售额的增长率。
イ.en: It shows this year's sales growth rate compared with the same period last year.

ウ.zh: 可以了解长期的销售额走势。
ウ.en: It shows the long-term trend of sales.

エ.zh: 可以了解因月份或季节等导致的销售额变动倾向。
エ.en: It shows the tendency of sales fluctuation by month, season, and the like.

stem.zh: 根据图1和图2可以解读出的对产品N销售额的分析，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate analysis of the sales of product N that can be read from Figure 1 and Figure 2?

ア.zh: 8月是增长的顶峰，此后增长趋于放缓。
ア.en: August was the peak of growth, and growth has slowed down since then.

イ.zh: 表示销售额累计的折线斜率保持恒定，每个月的销售额波动很小。
イ.en: The slope of the line showing cumulative sales is constant, and the monthly sales fluctuate little.

ウ.zh: 全年持续地比上一个月销售额有所增加。
ウ.en: Sales continuously increased over the previous month throughout the year.

エ.zh: 虽然存在月度波动，但从长期来看增长在持续。
エ.en: Although there is monthly fluctuation, growth is continuing when viewed over the long term.

2013h25h-q096.stem_jp_clean:
〔テクノロジ〕
A さんは売上傾向の分析と経済状況の動向から、製品 N の来年の年間売上高を今年の 10%増と見込んだ。また、月ごとに売上目標を設定して目標達成を管理するため、次の図の各月の売上傾向から目標売上高を算出する次のワークシートを作成した。

| | A | B | C | D | E | F |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 月 | 昨年の売上高 (単位 千円) | 今年の売上高 (単位 千円) | 平均 (単位 千円) | 月別売上構成比 | 目標売上高 (単位 千円) |
| 2 | 1月 | 3,000 | 3,200 | 3,100 | | |
| 3 | 2月 | 4,100 | 4,400 | 4,250 | | |
| 4 | 3月 | 11,900 | 13,200 | 12,550 | | |
| ⋮ | | | | | | |
| 13 | 12月 | 2,700 | 4,100 | 3,400 | | |
| 14 | 年間合計 | 60,600 | 70,300 | 65,450 | | |

注記 網掛けの部分は、表示していない。

ワークシートの各セルを次のように設定するとき、セル F14 に入力する計算式は、適切なものはどれか。

〔各セルの設定〕
・セル D2 に計算式 "(B2+C2)/2" を入力し、セル D3〜D13に複写する。
・セル D14に計算式 "合計(D2〜D13)" を入力する。
・セル E2 に計算式 "D2/D$14" を入力し、セル E3〜E14に複写する。
・セル F2 に計算式 "F$14*E2" を入力し、セル F3〜F13に複写する。

stem.zh:
〔技术〕
A 先生根据销售趋势分析和经济形势走向，预计产品 N 明年的年销售额将比今年增长 10%。此外，为了按月设定销售目标并管理目标达成情况，他根据下图各月的销售趋势，制作了如下用于计算目标销售额的工作表。

| | A | B | C | D | E | F |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 月份 | 去年的销售额 (单位 千日元) | 今年的销售额 (单位 千日元) | 平均 (单位 千日元) | 各月销售构成比 | 目标销售额 (单位 千日元) |
| 2 | 1月 | 3,000 | 3,200 | 3,100 | | |
| 3 | 2月 | 4,100 | 4,400 | 4,250 | | |
| 4 | 3月 | 11,900 | 13,200 | 12,550 | | |
| ⋮ | | | | | | |
| 13 | 12月 | 2,700 | 4,100 | 3,400 | | |
| 14 | 全年合计 | 60,600 | 70,300 | 65,450 | | |

注：带底纹的部分未予显示。

按如下方式设定工作表的各单元格时，单元格 F14 中应输入的计算式，哪一个是恰当的？

〔各单元格的设定〕
・在单元格 D2 中输入计算式 "(B2+C2)/2"，并复制到单元格 D3〜D13。
・在单元格 D14 中输入计算式 "合计(D2〜D13)"。
・在单元格 E2 中输入计算式 "D2/D$14"，并复制到单元格 E3〜E14。
・在单元格 F2 中输入计算式 "F$14*E2"，并复制到单元格 F3〜F13。
stem.en:
[Technology]
Based on a sales trend analysis and economic conditions, Mr. A projected that the annual sales of Product N for next year would be 10% higher than this year. In addition, in order to set monthly sales targets and manage their achievement, he created the following worksheet that calculates target sales from the monthly sales trends shown in the figure below.

| | A | B | C | D | E | F |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Month | Last year's sales (unit: thousand yen) | This year's sales (unit: thousand yen) | Average (unit: thousand yen) | Monthly sales ratio | Target sales (unit: thousand yen) |
| 2 | Jan | 3,000 | 3,200 | 3,100 | | |
| 3 | Feb | 4,100 | 4,400 | 4,250 | | |
| 4 | Mar | 11,900 | 13,200 | 12,550 | | |
| ⋮ | | | | | | |
| 13 | Dec | 2,700 | 4,100 | 3,400 | | |
| 14 | Annual total | 60,600 | 70,300 | 65,450 | | |

Note: Shaded parts are not shown.

When the worksheet cells are set as follows, which is the appropriate formula to enter in cell F14?

[Cell settings]
- Enter the formula "(B2+C2)/2" in cell D2, and copy it to cells D3 to D13.
- Enter the formula "SUM(D2:D13)" in cell D14.
- Enter the formula "D2/D$14" in cell E2, and copy it to cells E3 to E14.
- Enter the formula "F$14*E2" in cell F2, and copy it to cells F3 to F13.

エ.zh: 合计(F2〜F13)
エ.en: SUM(F2:F13)

stem.zh: 根据图1的路径图，求该网站转化率（conversion rate）的计算式，哪一项是恰当的？这里，式中的 a～f 是将图1所示的 A%～F% 的访问率换算为小数后的数值。
stem.en: Based on the path diagram in Figure 1, which formula is appropriate for calculating this site's conversion rate? Here, a to f in the formulas are the access rates A% to F% shown in Figure 1, converted into decimal values.

ア.zh: (a+b)×(c+d+e)×f
ア.en: (a+b)×(c+d+e)×f

イ.zh: (a+c+f)×(b+d+c+f)×(b+e+f)
イ.en: (a+c+f)×(b+d+c+f)×(b+e+f)

ウ.zh: a×c×f+b×d×c×f+b×e×f
ウ.en: a×c×f+b×d×c×f+b×e×f

エ.zh: f÷(a+b)
エ.en: f÷(a+b)

stem.zh:
N公司决定，作为通过广告为购物网站引流的方案，比较一个月的横幅广告与一次邮件广告。两个方案如下所述，比较其内容时，恰当的描述是哪一项？这里，各方案的点击率是指引向 N 公司购物网站的链接数占所展示的广告或所发送的邮件数量的比例。转化率是指购买手续完成数占来自该广告的链接数的比例，二者均为基于以往数据的预测值。
〔两个方案〕
A 方案　在 C 公司门户网站投放横幅广告。
费用　120,000 日元/月　广告展示次数　250,000 次/月　横幅广告点击率　0.8%　转化率　5%
B 方案　在 D 公司的电子邮件杂志中刊登一次广告。邮件基于 D 公司的数据库，锁定希望接收体育用品相关信息的人群进行发送。
费用　4 日元/封邮件　邮件发送数　50,000 封/次　邮件广告点击率　5%　转化率　8%
stem.en:
Company N has decided to compare one month of banner advertising with a single email advertisement as a strategy for driving traffic to its shopping site through advertising. Given the following two proposals, which is an appropriate comparison of them? Here, the click rate of each proposal is the ratio of the number of links to Company N's shopping site relative to the number of advertisements displayed or emails sent. The conversion rate is the ratio of completed purchase procedures relative to the number of links from that advertisement; both are forecast values based on past data.
[The two proposals]
Proposal A: Place banner advertising on Company C's portal site.
Cost: 120,000 yen/month; ad display count: 250,000 times/month; banner ad click rate: 0.8%; conversion rate: 5%
Proposal B: Place an advertisement once in Company D's email magazine. The emails are sent, based on Company D's database, targeting people who wish to receive information about sporting goods.
Cost: 4 yen per email; emails sent: 50,000 per time; email ad click rate: 5%; conversion rate: 8%

ア.zh: A 方案因广告送达用户的件数多，所以在增加访问 N 公司购物网站的用户数方面比 B 方案更有效。
ア.en: Proposal A reaches a larger number of users with the advertisement, so it is more effective than Proposal B for increasing the number of users who visit Company N's shopping site.

イ.zh: B 方案因锁定目标人群发送，转化率较高，但因邮件发送数少，所以完成购买手续的件数不如 A 方案。
イ.en: Proposal B sends to a targeted audience, so its conversion rate is high, but because the number of emails sent is small, the number of completed purchase procedures is inferior to Proposal A.

ウ.zh: B 方案因点击率高，所以获取用户一次点击所需的成本比 A 方案更便宜。
ウ.en: Proposal B has a high click rate, so the cost to obtain one click from a user is cheaper than Proposal A.

エ.zh: 通过广告获取一件购买手续完成所需的成本，B 方案更便宜。
エ.en: The cost to obtain one completed purchase procedure through advertising is cheaper for Proposal B.

stem.zh: N公司上个月为了宣传附带赠品的足球用品销售活动，在C公司的足球新闻网站上投放了横幅广告。据报告，上个月通过该横幅广告访问N公司首页的次数为3,000次。此外，对这3,000次访问在站内的行为进行了追踪，结果如图2所示。根据该结果，下列可推断的问题点中正确的是哪一项？此处，次数是指从原页面被链接跳转到下一页面的数量；将链接到各页面的次数与从该页面链接到N公司站内其他页面的数量之差，视为从N公司网站的流失。
stem.en: Last month, to advertise a soccer-goods sales campaign with bonus gifts, Company N placed a banner ad on Company C's soccer news site. It was reported that there were 3,000 accesses from that banner ad to Company N's top page last month. The movement of those 3,000 accesses within the site was then tracked, with results as shown in Figure 2. Based on these results, which of the following is a correct possible problem? Here, a count is the number of links followed from the original page to the next page, and the difference between the number of links into each page and the number of links from that page to another page within Company N's site is regarded as departure from Company N's site.

ア.zh: 从C公司网站访问的用户中，有半数可能只看了首页就离开了。
ア.en: Half of the users who accessed from Company C's site may have viewed only the top page and then left.

イ.zh: 从C公司网站访问的转化率，低于上个月整个网站的转化率。
イ.en: The conversion rate of accesses from Company C's site is lower than the conversion rate of the whole site last month.

ウ.zh: 进入购买流程的次数中，有半数以上未完成购买流程便移动到其他页面或流失了。
ウ.en: More than half of the cases that proceeded to the purchase procedure moved to another page or left without completing the purchase procedure.

エ.zh: 作为广告目的的活动信息页面的访问次数，少于商品介绍页面的访问次数。
エ.en: The number of accesses to the campaign information page, which is the purpose of the ad, is fewer than the number of accesses to the product introduction page.

stem.zh: N公司认为，要提高购物网站的销售额，重要的是要让用户能够安心购物，因此正在研究各种获得用户信任的措施。为了让用户能够安心地通过互联网购买商品，N公司实施的措施中，适当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Company N believes that, to increase sales on its shopping site, it is important to provide consideration so that users can shop with peace of mind, and is therefore studying various measures to gain users' trust. Which of the following is an appropriate measure for Company N to implement so that users can purchase products over the Internet with peace of mind?

ア.zh: 对于通过 Web 网站收发的个人信息，使用由第三方机构颁发的数字证书来加密发送的信息。
ア.en: For sending and receiving personal information via the website, encrypt the transmitted information using a digital certificate issued by a third-party organization.

イ.zh: 在公司信息页面上公开购物网站所使用的服务器机型、操作系统名称、所用软件、IP 地址等，以此显示系统的可靠性。
イ.en: On the company information page, publish the server model, OS name, software used, IP address, etc., of the shopping site to demonstrate the reliability of the system.

ウ.zh: 为避免结算手续出错，将在购买手续画面中输入的地址、姓名、信用卡号以明文邮件返送给用户，让用户确认信息无误。
ウ.en: To ensure there are no errors in the payment procedure, send the address, name, and credit card number entered on the purchase procedure screen back to the user in a plaintext email, and have the user confirm that the information is correct.

エ.zh: 为避免引起用户对个人信息处理方面的不安，不明示个人信息的使用目的、咨询方法等。
エ.en: To avoid causing anxiety about the handling of personal information, do not clearly state the purpose of using personal information, the contact method for inquiries, etc.
